summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KiloLab laundry app. Most features working correctly with some critical UX issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks CTA buttons preventing navigation to key pages
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot click main CTAs like 'Confier mon linge' to access /new-order

integration_issues.issue: Route requires authentication, redirects unauthenticated users to login
integration_issues.note: This may be intended behavior but should be documented

issues: Instagram popup appears after 5 seconds and interferes with user interactions

passed_tests: Landing page loads successfully with hero video
Trust badge and CTA elements present
Price comparator with weight slider (3-15kg range) works correctly
Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu
Multi-step stepper on /new-order page (formula selection working)
Become Washer page accessible via both /become-washer and /washers routes
Footer with all expected sections (Services, Partenaires, Légal, Contact)
Responsive design adapts correctly to mobile viewport

critical: Fix InstagramPromoPopup overlay interference - modal blocks CTA interactions preventing users from navigating to /new-order and other key pages
medium: Document that /referral page requires authentication or consider making it public
Service Worker not detected - verify PWA functionality
Consider reducing Instagram popup delay or adding better dismissal options

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most features working, critical UX issue with modal overlay
success_percentage.pwa: 75% - Manifest present but service worker not detected
